findings.description: The XML configuration example uses `nablarch.fw.handler.MultiThreadExecutionHandler` (note the `.handler.` package segment), which differs from the class name in s1 (`nablarch.fw.MultiThreadExecutionHandler`). This fully-qualified class name appears in the s3 code block but is absent from s3 hints.
`BatchAction` is mentioned in s1 content under 関連するハンドラ but is missing from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:doc:`BatchAction`` listed in the related handlers table with explanation about callback usage
